name: Cadente
short_description: Reach the skies and make it to space with just your jumps. In this platform game, help Cadente collect stars and overcome various challenges. Escape the cave, climb the tower, and reach the skies. Face bosses, show them the power of words, and finally shine like a star.
detailed_description:
Reach the skies and make it to space with just your jumps. Go from the mud to the top in this adventure with Cadente, a simple star with much to tell us. Face various challenges, shine, and light up the skies.

Escape the cave, climb the tower, and pass through the clouds. Face bosses, show them the power of words, and finally shine like a star.

✨What to expect from Cadente✨

  • Unique jumping mechanics

  • 25 challenging levels

  • Exclusive soundtrack

  • Varied environments

  • Heartfelt dialogues
